notes: The game had an issue where it would either flip rapidly between the current frame and the previous frame, or simply fail to clear the previous frame off the page altogether. Disabling Esync had no effect. Disabling D3d11 made the game not launch at all. Using Wine D3d11 worked perfectly with no problems whatsoever
title: We Know the Devil
